hyperedges.label: CloudGym feature-parity roadmap phases (financeiro → catraca → admin menu structure)
Shared liquid-glass visual material system across admin panel and aluno dashboard
Catraca access-control sync/reconciliation closed loop (create, toggle, poll, correct drift)
Shared Admin Shell Layout (Sidebar Nav, Icons, Theme Toggle)
Aluno Enrollment Flow: Plano + Pagamento + Cadastro Facial
Fluxo de Autenticação (login / criar conta / esqueci senha / redefinir senha)
Área do Aluno - Casca Compartilhada (dashboard/treinos/ranking/indicacao/perfil com nav inferior comum)
Funil de Conversão: Landing -> Matrícula -> Login/Dashboard
